profiles.name: Strip
profiles.summary: Generic ESP32 strip setup for one data wire, power, and ground.
profiles.description: Use this for common WS2812B/SK6812-style strips. The starter image supports live runtime setup for LED count, GPIO, color order, brightness, and power limit.

profiles.name: Matrix
profiles.summary: Mesmerizer-class HUB75 setup with the known-good 64x32 panel profile.
profiles.description: Use this for the current Mesmerizer/HUB75 hardware path. HUB75 panel mapping is build-defined today, so the MVP keeps the known-good 64x32 topology fixed.

profiles.name: M5
profiles.summary: M5StickC Plus/Plus2 setup using the Grove LED output path.
profiles.description: Use this when the controller is an M5Stick-style device. The default data pin is GPIO 32 for the Grove connector, with audio-capable firmware and the device web UI enabled.
